title: lenticula polyrrhiza
intro: Lenticula polyrrhiza, also known as the Chinese Polypore, is a type of edible fungus found in East Asia, characterized by its unique, multi-lobed cap. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Lenticula polyrrhiza include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the Chinese Polypore is often used in teas, soups, or as a dried powder to harness its medicinal properties.
